name: View, Approve, Reply or Export Product Reviews
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "View, Reply or Approve a Review"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When a customer leaves a review on a product you have the ability to approve, reply or delete the review:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Reviews", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the review to open it."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "From the "}, {"text": "Status", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down menu, choose to view, hide, set as new or follow-up the review."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can also edit the content of the comment or to reply to the review in this page."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Review and your replies will then display in the tabulated section of your product page much like the example below."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Product Review Settings"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If product reviews are not displaying, you may need to turn on a setting:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Advanced Configuration", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search for "}, {"text": "SHOW_PRODUCT_REVIEWS", "code": true}, {"text": " in the name field, and change it to "}, {"text": "Yes", "bold": true}, {"text": " to display your reviews."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Webstore Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the customer reviews sections you can auto-approve reviews, and allow anonymous reviews."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Export Product Reviews"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product reviews can be exported by creating a product export template."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Product reviews cannot be imported."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Export data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Perform complex export", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and choose "}, {"text": "Create new custom export template", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fill the fields in as per the table below:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Recommended Value"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Export Type"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Inventory Export"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Export Template Name"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product Reviews"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Export Template Description"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "All product reviews"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "File Name"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product-Reviews.csv"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "File Type"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "CSV Data"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-a384f09f"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save & Continue", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the "}, {"text": "Send File To", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down menu to "}, {"text": "Local Server", "bold": true}, {"text": ". The File Location (HTTPS URL) field displays where the file can be downloaded once it is generated."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "SKU,Inventory ID,username,name,Date Formatted as yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss,Rating,Review Title,Review", "code": true}, {"text": "\n\n"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Copy the below details and paste them into the relevant sections of the file builder:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "FILE HEADER", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "FILE BODY - body", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "[%thumb_list type:'product_reviews' limit:'250'%]"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "[%param filter_1%][@SKU@][%/param%]"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "[%param *body%][@SKU@],[@inventory_id@],[@username@],[@bill_first_name@],[%format type:'date' format:'#Y-#M-#D #H:#I:#S'%][@insert_date@][%/format%],[@score@],\"[%format type:'text' nohtml:'1' rmhtml:'1'%][@title@][%/format%]\",\"[%format type:'text' nohtml:'1' rmhtml:'1'%][@review@][%/format%]\""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "[@spacer@][%/param%][%/thumb_list%]"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "There is no carriage return/extra line required after this code."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Generate Data File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button at the top of the page."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Wait 5 - 10 minutes for the file to be created, and then download it from the link in step 5."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Reviews Actions"}], "data-id": "4"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reviews can have a number of actions applied to them to help you manage them:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Action"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Status change"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Approve"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sets the status as \u2018Approved\u2019"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Approves the review to display on the webstore"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set New"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sets the status as \u2018New\u2019"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Indicates that the review is new in the control panel view"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Hide"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sets the status as \u2018Hidden\u2019"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Hides the review from appearing on the webstore"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set Follow Up"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sets the status as \u2018Followup\u2019"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If it\u2019s a negative review, use this to flag the review and set a follow-up to email the reviewer"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Bulk Change Product"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "NA"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allows you to change the product that the review/s are assigned to (such as, if the SKU changed or incorrect product)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Bulk Email"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", [{"text": "Deletes the review from the system"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-9b530587"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
